perks.name: Vampires
perks.description: Enemies heal for a portion of the damage they deal

perks.name: Spectral
perks.description: There is a chance that bullets will pass through enemies without dealing damage

perks.name: Durable
perks.description: Enemies are more resistant to damage

perks.name: Caffeinated
perks.description: Enemies are extra twitchy and fast

perks.name: Slugish
perks.description: Slower enemies, but they are more resistant to damage
